raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a metaphysical equivalence that collapses temporal distinctions into a single transcendent outcome",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "duration is ultimately irrelevant to final metaphysical effect",
    "long and short temporal spans share an identical non-physical endpoint or dissolution",
    "a unified 'effect' exists beyond measurable time"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "coherent within a frame that posits time as illusory or subordinate to an atemporal reality; internally consistent if the premise of a singular effect is granted",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "when the goal is cultivating equanimity toward lifespan differences or impermanence, provided one accepts a non-dual or eternalist ontology",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "if taken to justify indifference to ethical or experiential differences within time, or when no shared transcendent effect can be verified"
}
